answer.text: A mutual fund performance rating system
A credit scoring system for investors
SEBI Complaints Redress System - an online platform for investors to file complaints against market intermediaries

explanation.text: **The Logic:** SCORES (SEBI Complaints Redress System) is SEBI's online platform where investors can file complaints against listed companies, mutual funds, brokers, and other market intermediaries. The complaint is forwarded to the concerned entity which must resolve it within a specified time. Investors can track the status of their complaints online. **The Trap:** SCORES is for filing complaints after the AMC has failed to resolve them directly. It is not a rating system or trading platform. The complaint must be first made to the AMC before approaching SCORES. **Cross-Exam Context:** Also tested in V-A and Series XXIV. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Familiarize yourself with the SCORES portal so you can help retired investors if they ever need to file a complaint. The portal is available at scores.sebi.gov.in and is accessible from a computer or smartphone.
